Park Eun Bin

  • Name: Park Eun Bin
  • Native name: 박은빈
  • Also Known as: Park Eunbin
  • Nationality: South Korean
  • Gender: Female
  • Born: September 4, 1992
  • Age: 33
Park Eun Bin is a South Korean actress born in Seoul. She is managed by Namoo Actors. She debuted at the age of five and has acted in numerous television series as a child actress and younger versions of various characters.

She played her first leading role in the time-traveling romance "Operation Proposal". She won the 2009 KBS Drama Awards: Best Young Actress (The Iron Empress).

After "Operation Proposal", Park went back to supporting roles until she gained recognition for her role in a youth ensemble cast series about a group of young early 20s women, "Hello, My Twenties!" in 2016 and its sequel in 2017. From 2017 onwards, Park has starred in leading roles in various dramas including the 2019-2020 sport workplace Hot Stove League.

In 2022 at the Asian Contents Awards in Busan, Park Eun Bin won the "Best Actress Award" for her role in the drama “Extraordinary Attorney Woo”.

In 2023, at the 59th Baeksang Arts Awards, the actress won the Grand Prize for her role in the drama "Extraordinary Attorney Woo". Edit Biography
